subject: Spring Savings: Try a Times Digital Subscription for just $5 for 12 Weeks
body:
Just $5 for your first 12 weeks of The Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTKWqnB81HXJB846M5AAwENcvt/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTKWqnB81HXJB846M5AAwENcvt/viwb?t_params=EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

SPRING FORWARD: IN WITH THE NEW

JUST $5 FOR 12 WEEKS ON A TIMES DIGITAL SUBSCRIPTION

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTKWqnB81HXJB846M5AAwENcvt/sub2

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear Times Reader, 

The New York Times is dedicated to delivering the most future-
forward stories, trends and information to inspire new pursuits 
and challenges. This spring, commit to a new you with a Times 
Digital Subscription: just $5 for 12 weeks. 

Explore your potential with unlimited access to immersive news 
and insight on the newly redesigned NYTimes.com and our 
best-in-class apps. Delivering award-winning journalism and 
innovative multimedia, the Times digital experience keeps you 
connected to the topics that inspire you most. 

No matter where you are or where you are going, add the world's 
finest journalism to your daily routine and get inspired this 
spring -- just $5 for 12 weeks.

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTKWqnB81HXJB846M5AAwENcvt/sub3

*****

Become a Times Digital Subscriber and get unlimited access to:

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York Times 
digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, 
Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile 
apps are not supported on all devices. You will be billed $5 for 
the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 
12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and your 
credit card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each 
four-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is 
canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms 
of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. 
Other restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTKWqnB81HXJB846M5AAwENcvt/nyt

Privacy Policy:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTKWqnB81HXJB846M5AAwENcvt/privacy

Contact Us:
help@nytimes.com

Unsubscribe:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTKWqnB81HXJB846M5AAwENcvt/unsub?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&REGI_ID=47275261

Just $5 for your first 12 weeks of The Times
View in browser
Dear Times Reader,

The New York Times is dedicated to delivering the most future-forward stories, trends and information to inspire new pursuits and challenges. This spring, commit to a new you with a Times Digital Subscription: just $5 for 12 weeks.

Explore your potential with unlimited access to immersive news and insight on the newly redesigned NYTimes.com and our best-in-class apps. Delivering award-winning journalism and innovative multimedia, the Times digital experience keeps you connected to the topics that inspire you most.

No matter where you are or where you are going, add the world’s finest journalism to your daily routine and get inspired this spring — just $5 for 12 weeks.
You received this email because you are a registered user of The New York Times.

Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. You will be billed $5 for the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.
